metadata.description: Markdown-only Agent Team workflow for Claude Code and Codex. It starts Agent Team missions, opens a local board, and coordinates work through project Markdown files without requiring Mexus.

plugins.name: mexus-skill
plugins.description: Installs the standalone Agent Team toolkit. Registers team, run, roundtable, board, team-status, and team-stop under the mexus-skill namespace.

plugins.name: mexus-skill-team
plugins.description: Starts or continues a Markdown-backed Agent Team Mission using the host CLI's own subagent mechanism and kanban.md as the coordination protocol.

plugins.name: mexus-skill-run
plugins.description: Executes the next actionable tasks from a Markdown-backed Agent Team kanban using the host CLI's own subagent mechanism.

plugins.name: mexus-skill-board
plugins.description: Starts a local read-only Web board for an existing Markdown-backed Agent Team Mission.

plugins.name: mexus-skill-roundtable
plugins.description: Opens a RoundTable proposal in the active Markdown-backed Agent Team Mission.

plugins.name: mexus-skill-team-status
plugins.description: Prints a concise summary of the current Markdown-backed Agent Team Mission and outstanding kanban tasks.

plugins.name: mexus-skill-team-stop
plugins.description: Stops the local Agent Team board process without deleting mission files.
